t2PolicyHint: Select a primary and independent secondary model, then copy a validated catalog draft for review.
prArtifactOnlyHint: Selections prepare catalog-as-code. They never change the running control plane from this browser.
distinctPublisher: Primary and secondary publishers must differ
pairInvalid: Choose two models from distinct publishers
pairValidationHint: The quality gate runs both roles on every T2 judgment; a single-publisher pair is blocked.
noValidPair: No valid T2 model pair is available in the registry.
copyDraftFailed: Clipboard access failed. Select the draft text and copy it manually.
catalogHint: Models currently visible in the Azure catalog, combined with regional quota and existing FDAI deployments.
catalogUnavailableHint: Live Azure discovery is not available in this runtime. Registry candidates remain usable for governance drafts.
searchCatalogPlaceholder: Search GPT family, version, or status
catalogNoMatches: No deployable or deployed GPT models match this search.
autoProvisionBoundary: Auto-provision candidates are applied through the reviewed registry, resolver, and Terraform pipeline. The console never creates or updates an Azure deployment directly.
